summary: Iteration 60 - Lot Creation with Explicit Contributors (2-Step Wizard). All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend 2-step wizard fully functional: Step 1 (lot info) → Step 2 (farmer selection with tonnage input). Contributors stored correctly with farmer_id, farmer_name, tonnage_kg. Total tonnage = sum of individual contributions.

issues: React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> in table tbody - cosmetic issue, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/cooperative/lots correctly accepts optional 'contributors' array with farmer_id, farmer_name, tonnage_kg
GET /api/cooperative/lots/{lot_id}/contributors returns stored contributors with their explicit tonnage
Frontend 2-step wizard: Step 1 collects lot info, Step 2 shows active members with checkboxes and tonnage inputs
Summary bar in Step 2 shows live updates: selected count, total kg, progress vs target tonnage
LotContributor Pydantic model correctly defined in cooperative.py (line 48-51)
CoopLotCreate model accepts Optional[List[LotContributor]] for contributors (line 60)
Backend stores contributors array in lot document when provided, falls back to parcel-based logic otherwise
seed_data_creation: Created test lots: 'Test Lot Full Flow' with 3 contributors (3000 kg total), 'TEST_E2E_Lot_*' with 3 contributors
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lot creation with explicit contributors fully functional. 2-step wizard working: Step 1 (lot info) → Step 2 (farmer selection + tonnage). GET /api/cooperative/members returns active members for selection. POST /api/cooperative/lots accepts contributors array. GET /api/cooperative/lots/{id}/contributors returns stored contributors.
